title: habenaria intermedia
intro: Habenaria intermedia, also known as the intermediate orchid or yellow bog orchid, is a species of orchid native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Habenaria intermedia include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as coughs and colds, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of fever. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tea or tincture, and it can also be used in infusions or dried and powdered for later use.
